turns.question: Hi, welcome in, how are you doing today?
turns.answer: I'm doing great, thanks, how about you?

turns.question: Can't complain at all. Is this your first time here?
turns.answer: Actually, yeah, this is my first visit.

turns.question: Welcome then! Are you dining in or taking it to go today?
turns.answer: I'll be staying in, thanks, I've got some work to do.

turns.question: Perfect, feel free to grab a table whenever you're ready.
turns.answer: Thanks, I will, just give me a second with the menu.

turns.question: Of course, take your time, no rush at all.
turns.answer: I appreciate that, this menu has a lot going on.

turns.question: Ha, it can be overwhelming at first, let me know if you want a recommendation.
turns.answer: Actually, that would help a lot, thank you.

turns.question: Hey, welcome back! The usual today?
turns.answer: Actually, I think I'll try something different today.

turns.question: Oh, feeling adventurous, I like it. Any idea what you're leaning toward?
turns.answer: Not yet, could you give me a second to look?

turns.question: Of course, take your time, I'll be right here.
turns.answer: Thanks, I might ask you for a suggestion in a minute.

turns.question: Anytime, I've got a few favorites I could point you toward.
turns.answer: Perfect, that's exactly what I was hoping for.

turns.question: Cold one out there today, huh? Perfect coffee weather.
turns.answer: Yeah, freezing, definitely need something warm today.

turns.question: That definitely narrows things down for you then.
turns.answer: It really does, something hot sounds perfect right now.

turns.question: Hi there, sorry for the wait, how can I help you?
turns.answer: No worries at all, I just got here myself.

turns.question: Good afternoon, are you a rewards member with us?
turns.answer: Yes, I am, let me scan my app real quick.

turns.question: Perfect, go ahead whenever you're ready.
turns.answer: Got it, done, thanks for reminding me.

turns.question: Are you meeting someone here, or just grabbing coffee for yourself?
turns.answer: Just grabbing coffee for myself today.

turns.question: Got it. Any big plans for the rest of your day?
turns.answer: Nothing too crazy, just heading to work after this.

turns.question: Well, hopefully this gives you a good start to it.
turns.answer: I'm counting on it, honestly, long day ahead.

turns.question: Do you know what you're in the mood for yet?
turns.answer: Not quite, mind if I take one more look at the board?

turns.question: Not at all, take your time, I'll check back in a moment.
turns.answer: Thanks, I really appreciate it.
